---
title: "Simon Del Villar"
description: ""
about:
    template: trestles
    links:
        - icon: linkedin
          text: LinkedIn
          url: https://www.linkedin.com/in/simon-del-villar-80b12a27b/
        - icon: github
          text: Github
          url: https://github.com/simondelvillar
        - icon: instagram
          text: Instagram
          url: https://www.instagram.com/simondelvillar/
        - text: "{{< fa envelope >}} Email"
          url: mailto:simon.joven.delvillar@gmail.com
image: img/simonphoto.jpg
comments: false
---

# Bio 
Hello! Simon. When I’m not buried under a pile of math homework or deep in a textbook, I’m usually enjoying the outdoors, taking photos with my photography friends, and spending time with the people I love.

I’m a math student, but I’m a 'generalist' at heart. I find joy in the variety of mathematics—from the abstract puzzles that keep me up at night to the data-driven projects that help me make sense of the world.

I built this site to bridge the gap between my academic life and the things that genuinely interest me. Grab a coffee (or a tea, or water!), browse my latest projects, and if you want to talk shop—or just talk about stuff—let's connect."

# Beyond Mathematics
- 📷 Landscape and nature photography (check out [my photography site!](https://simondelvillar.github.io/simondvphotography/))
- 🏔️ Exploring local trails and outdoor spaces
- 💻 Programming and personal coding projects
- 📊 Data visualization and analytics
- 🏃 Staying active through sports and recreation
- 📚 Learning new skills and exploring new ideas
- Don't forget food!


<div class="listening-now">
🎧 Currently listening to <em>Strangers in the Night</em> — Bert Kaempfert
</div>


## Behind the Scenes

Most of this website is built and maintained through Git, GitHub, and Quarto.

<div class="commit-map">
  <img
    src="https://github-readme-stats.vercel.app/api?username=simondelvillar&show_icons=true&hide_border=true&rank_icon=github"
    alt="GitHub statistics">
</div>
